what_it_does: Records the spacing circuit for the design system, covering the directive, principle, traced finding, DNA-to-consumer circuit, address scheme, rollout method, verification protocol, and status history through estate-wide geometry migration.
observations: Parses Tim's directive into specific work constraints: full circuit, recording, estate rollout, no tuning during rollout, and preservation of existing hardcoded values.
Frames spacing as a semantic relationship signal derived from bond strength rather than an independently chosen number.
Contrasts colour as already live with spacing as previously proof/build-time/hardcoded, then defines the missing spacing injection path.
Defines two injected address layers: px-valued value addresses and semantic bond addresses.
Separates Phase 2 pixel-preserving migration from Phase 3 interpretive tuning.
Uses verification by running proofs, browser checks, pixel identity, density-live checks, and lint-space ledger movement.
Maintains a chronological status ledger from rc-6 through sr-5, ending with estate rollout complete and Phase 3 remaining.
standouts: The file explicitly treats the harvested spacing vocabulary as a temporary mirror, not as tuned design intent.
The address scheme preserves existing pixel values while making them density-responsive through injected CSS variables.
The document distinguishes mechanical migration from later relationship assignment and proportion tuning.
conventions: Uses campaign/spec prose with numbered sections, tables, diagrams, status bullets, and direct quoted directive text.
Uses capitalized emphasis for process constraints such as PREREQUISITE, MIRROR, COMPLETE, and BY USE.
Names rollout states with rc/sr identifiers and appends verification outcomes inline.
Breaks ordinary API documentation style by mixing principle, implementation circuit, operational method, and project journal in one file.
concerns: The file is dense and combines binding directive, technical spec, rollout history, and backlog framing, which may make later updates harder to localize.
Several completion claims depend on external proofs and files that are only referenced, not evidenced inside this file.
The status section is long relative to the stable spec sections, so the record may age unevenly as later phases move.
notes: Brief someone that this file is the spacing-system record: why spacing must resolve through DNA, how live injection works, how the rollout preserved pixels, and what tuning remains.
questions: What exact harvested values are emitted now, beyond the abbreviated examples listed in the text?
Where is the baseline evidence for the pixel-identity claims stored?
What process decides when Phase 3 relationship assignments are ready to be recorded here?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: it records the complete spacing circuit, rollout plan, verification protocol, and subsequent rollout status rather than only describing a principle.
apparent_themes: separation of mechanical rollout from interpretive tuning
loadable DNA as source of values
intention_signals: It appears intended to make spacing a live, DNA-driven system like colour while preserving current visuals until a later authored tuning pass assigns semantic relationships.
novelty: The distinct move is using px-named CSS variable addresses as a temporary estate mirror, so existing hardcoded geometry can become live and density-responsive before semantic bond tuning occurs.
contribution: Contributes a neutral record of the spacing circuit, including the relationship-based rule model, injection requirement, px-address migration strategy, verification expectations, and rollout status that a fused system would retain as provenance and implementation rationale.
summary_for_embedding: This is a rule-core campaign record specifying and tracking the DNA-driven spacing circuit from semantic bond rules through engine resolution, live CSS variable injection, consumer migration, verification, and estate rollout completion.
intention_for_embedding: It was written to turn spacing from hardcoded/build-time values into a live loadable-DNA system while deferring interpretive proportion tuning until after the mechanical rollout was complete.
